mapper.select:
select ACCDNT_AREA_FLAG, NTNL_PNT_NO, LCTN_SIGN_NO, SNSR_SRL_NO, SGG_CD, tcc.cm_nm as sgg_nm, slr_pnl_flag from tb_ntnl_pnt_no_m tnpnm left outer join tb_com_cd tcc on tnpnm.SGG_CD = tcc.cm_std_cd where tnpnm.use_flag = true
AND tnpnm.sgg_cd = #{sggCd}
AND (tnpnm.ntnl_pnt_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchText},'%') OR tnpnm.lctn_sign_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchText},'%'))
ORDER BY tnpnm.SRT_SQ

WITH TEMP AS ( SELECT gps_lon_alarm_level ,gps_lat_alarm_level ,temp_alarm_level ,hum_alarm_level ,slope_alarm_level ,shock_alarm_level ,sound_alarm_level ,battery1_alarm_level ,battery2_alarm_level ,battery3_alarm_level FROM tb_snsr_data where ntnl_pnt_no= #{ntnlPntNo} AND snsr_data_seq = (SELECT MAX(snsr_data_seq) FROM tb_snsr_data WHERE ntnl_pnt_no= #{ntnlPntNo}) ) ,TEMP2 AS ( SELECT CAST(gps_lon_alarm_level AS TEXT) AS VALUE ,'01' AS CM_CD ,'(경도)' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT CAST(gps_lat_alarm_level AS TEXT) AS VALUE ,'01' AS CM_CD ,'(위도)' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT (string_to_array(temp_alarm_level, ':'))[1] AS VALUE ,'02' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT (string_to_array(temp_alarm_level, ':'))[2] AS VALUE ,'03' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT (string_to_array(hum_alarm_level, ':'))[1] AS VALUE ,'04' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT (string_to_array(hum_alarm_level, ':'))[2] AS VALUE ,'05' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT (string_to_array(slope_alarm_level, ':'))[1] AS VALUE ,'06' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT (string_to_array(slope_alarm_level, ':'))[2] AS VALUE ,'07' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT (string_to_array(slope_alarm_level, ':'))[3] AS VALUE ,'08' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT CAST(shock_alarm_level AS TEXT) AS VALUE ,'09' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT CAST(sound_alarm_level AS TEXT) AS VALUE ,'10' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT CAST(battery1_alarm_level AS TEXT) AS VALUE ,'11' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT CAST(battery2_alarm_level AS TEXT) AS VALUE ,'12' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP UNION ALL SELECT CAST(battery3_alarm_level AS TEXT) AS VALUE ,'13' AS CM_CD ,'' AS REF FROM TEMP ) SELECT CONCAT(b.CM_DESC,C.REF) AS eventType ,CASE WHEN C.VALUE IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(C.VALUE,refval03) ELSE '' END AS columns1 ,refval01 AS columns2 FROM tb_com_grp_cd A INNER JOIN TB_COM_CD B ON A.com_grp_cd_seq = B.com_grp_cd_seq INNER JOIN TEMP2 C ON B.CM_CD = C.CM_CD WHERE a.cm_grp_cd = 'A06' ORDER BY SORT_SEQ
